name: Key Lime Pie 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine together. Press into a 9x13 inch pan. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes until slightly brown. Remove and cool.
2. Blend together the cooled whip, cream cheese, sweetened condensed milk, lime juice, and green food coloring (if using). Spread over the crust and chill until firm. Optionally, omit the crust step and place the filling into sherbet glasses.
